name: UGREEN Foldable Laptop Stand 40289
problem: A laptop screen sits too low for a desk workflow and needs adjustable elevation without hiding the base ventilation area.
verdict: Selected as a simple elevation tool with an exact model trail across the manufacturer, Amazon Egypt, and Noon Egypt. Raising the laptop does not by itself create an ergonomic workstation; an external keyboard and mouse are the practical fit gate.
bestFor: Editorial fit judgment: desk users who already have or plan to use an external keyboard and mouse
Editorial fit judgment: users who want a foldable stand with five listed height settings
skipIf: You must keep using the laptop keyboard while the screen is raised
Your device is outside the listed 8–17.3-inch range or exceeds the listed 5 kg load
compatibility: Manufacturer lists five height settings and up to 5 kg load
The open center is described as a ventilation area
Use an external keyboard and mouse when the raised keyboard is not comfortable to reach
